title: Rentokil FM24 Mouse and Rat Odour Sachets, Black
features: Highly fragranced sache, masks the smell left by mice, rats and other pests
Ideal for under floorboards and behind walls
description: From the manufacturer The Rentokil Mouse and Rat Odour Sachet is highly fragranced to mask the smell left by mice, rats and other pests in and around the home. The easy to use sachet is long lasting and contains no poisons. Follow the on pack instructions. Remove the outer foil and place the sachet in the desired location. To remove, simply pick up (if possible) and dispose in a bin with a secure lid. Lasts up to 6 weeks This product is intended for home and garden use. Ideal under floorboards and behind walls. Always read the label before use. Highly fragranced sachet to mask the smell left by mice, rats and other pests in and around the home. Ideal for under floorboards or behind walls. Easy to use and poison-free. Lasts up to 6 weeks.
